name: Trade Flow into Favorable Book Shape
hypothesis: A positive trade flow imbalance should be more predictive of a price increase when the book shape is favorable. This means the bid side is patient/deep (low BBO concentration) and the ask side lacks a large, aggressive wall at the BBO (low BBO concentration). This spec combines these three conditions.
mutation_note: New spec created to combine trade flow with book shape primitives as per the Block C directive, hypothesizing a synergistic effect.
